ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the sales data (formatted MM/YYYY) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sales data belongs */,
  "fourseam" INTEGER /* Sales figures for Fourseam equipment */,
  "sinker" INTEGER /* Sales figures for Sinker equipment */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Sales figures for Change equipment */,
  "slider" INTEGER /* Sales figures for Slider equipment */,
  "curve" INTEGER /* Sales figures for Curve equipment */,
  "cutter" INTEGER /* Sales figures for Cutter equipment */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., rods, reels, lures) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "rep_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the rep operates */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the inventory belongs */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which to reorder the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who generated the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the report belongs */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the sales report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales forecast record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the forecast belongs */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for the forecast (formatted MM/YYYY) */,
  "expected_sales_fourseam" INTEGER /* Expected sales for Fourseam equipment */,
  "expected_sales_sinker" INTEGER /* Expected sales for Sinker equipment */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the forecast (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the analysis belongs */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the analysis (formatted MM/YYYY) */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales figures for the month */,
  "top_product" TEXT /* Top-selling product for the month */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analysis_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the sales channel (e.g., online, retail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the promotion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the promotion belongs */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage being offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promo_type" TEXT /* Type of the promotion (e.g., discount, bundle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
